hero.kicker: Personal Life & Wellness · Ansiversa mini app
hero.title: Health Report Organizer
hero.description: Organize health reports, categories, facilities, document references, and follow-up notes in one private workflow.

flow.title: Reports → Categories → Documents → Insights
steps: Group reports by category and facility
Track attachment references and report notes
Review follow-up and recent activity insights

differences.title: A practical index for health paperwork
differences.description: Health Report Organizer keeps health document context findable without claiming diagnosis, treatment guidance, or provider portal integration.

items.title: Record
items.description: Save report title, date, type, status, priority, summary, category, and facility.

items.title: Connect
items.description: Link attachment metadata and notes to the report that needs context.

items.title: Review
items.description: See follow-up records, reviewed reports, attachment count, and recent activity.

feel.title: Calm, private, and appointment-ready
feel.description: The workflow helps users keep health paperwork organized while staying clear about medical boundaries.

items.title: Easy to find
items.description: Search and filters make report records easier to revisit.

items.title: Clear context
items.description: Categories, facilities, attachment references, and notes keep related details together.

items.title: Responsible boundaries
items.description: The app organizes records without interpreting results or giving medical advice.

audiences.title: Who uses Health Report Organizer
audiences.description: Health Report Organizer is useful for people who need a private way to track health report metadata and related notes.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Keep personal reports, labs, imaging records, and discharge summaries easier to find.

items.title: Caregivers
items.description: Organize family report references and appointment questions in a structured workflow.

items.title: Appointment planners
items.description: Review report status and notes before speaking with a doctor or facility.

resourceSection.title: Health Report Organizer essentials
resourceSection.description: The app focuses on organization, review status, attachment references, and report notes.

items.title: Health reports
items.description: Create report records with date, type, status, priority, summary, category, and facility.

items.title: Documents and notes
items.description: Track file names, sources, storage locations, links, and report-specific notes.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review total reports, reviewed records, follow-up load, attachment count, and recent activity.

groupedSection.title: A clear path from record to review
groupedSection.description: The overview introduces the workflow that starts at the reports workspace.

items.name: Reports
items.description: Store lightweight health report records and review status.

items.name: Categories and facilities
items.description: Keep recurring organization labels and source references reusable.

items.name: Documents
items.description: Record where attachments live without storing medical files in V1.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Use dashboard signals to revisit recent reports and follow-up notes.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Health Report Organizer follows the shared mini-app overview metadata pattern.
items: Protected workflow routes run inside the persistent Ansiversa shell.
Owner-scoped API responses keep lists lightweight and detail edits complete.

finalCta.title: Open Health Report Organizer
finalCta.description: Start with reports, then organize categories, documents, notes, and insights.
